composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and complete the backend code in main.py
- Resolve any issues related to routing and data handling.
- Ensure all routes correspond correctly to frontend templates.
- Implement or fix all backend logic for user management, book catalog browsing and searching, borrowing and returning books, managing reservations, writing and editing reviews, tracking borrowing history, and payment of fines.
- Coordinate with Programmer 2 to ensure backend routes match frontend URLs.
composition.Programmer 2:
Develop all missing frontend HTML templates in the 'templates/' directory
- Implement the frontend code for all 9 missing pages  book_catalog.html, book_details.html, borrow_confirmation.html, my_borrowings.html, my_reservations.html, my_reviews.html, write_review.html, user_profile.html, payment_confirmation.html.
- Follow the detailed page design and element specifications from the requirements document.
- Ensure all element IDs are correctly included for frontend rendering and interaction.
- Use Flask route URLs in the frontend code, not direct HTML file names.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure frontend forms and buttons correctly call backend routes.
